name: Necroworld Banshee
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>屍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のバンシー
desc: "Zombie World" in the Field Zone cannot be destroyed by card effects, also neither player can target it with card effects. (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your field or GY; activate 1 "Zombie World" from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Necroworld Banshee" once per turn.
mnst_eff: "Zombie World" in the Field Zone cannot be destroyed by card effects, also neither player can target it with card effects. (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your field or GY; activate 1 "Zombie World" from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Necroworld Banshee" once per turn.
eff: "Zombie World" in the Field Zone cannot be destroyed by card effects, also neither player can target it with card effects. (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your field or GY; activate 1 "Zombie World" from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Necroworld Banshee" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
